comment_text.sn12.43:2.2: This discourse (and the next two) begin with consciousness in the process of sense stimulation. They offer a compressed sequence that focuses on the arising of suffering in the present life, and how by letting go craving it is possible to not generate a future life.
comment_text.sn12.43:2.4: The text jumps straight from craving to suffering, although the full sequence is stated in the cessation series. The next discourse, which is otherwise similar, lists all the factors, and the one after that goes to grasping, then indicates an abbreviation. I think the full sequence is meant in every case, and the sign of abbreviation in the Pali text is missing by mistake.
comment_text.sn12.43:4.5: Craving can cease without leading to grasping for one practicing the path.

root_text.sn12.43:1.3: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.sn12.43:1.4: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.sn12.43:2.2: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn12.43:3.1: Sotañca paṭicca sadde ca uppajjati sotaviññāṇaṁ …pe…
root_text.sn12.43:3.5: manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn12.43:4.2: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn12.43:5.1: Sotañca paṭicca sadde ca uppajjati sotaviññāṇaṁ …pe…
root_text.sn12.43:5.5: manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.

translation_text.sn12.43:1.2: “Mendicants, I will teach you the origin and disappearance of suffering.
translation_text.sn12.43:1.3: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.sn12.43:2.1: “And what, mendicants, is the origin of suffering?
translation_text.sn12.43:2.2: Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn12.43:2.3: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn12.43:2.4: Feeling is a requirement for craving. …
translation_text.sn12.43:2.5: This is the origin of suffering.
translation_text.sn12.43:3.1: Ear consciousness arises dependent on the ear and sounds. …
translation_text.sn12.43:3.2: Nose consciousness arises dependent on the nose and smells. …
translation_text.sn12.43:3.3: Tongue consciousness arises dependent on the tongue and tastes. …
translation_text.sn12.43:3.4: Body consciousness arises dependent on the body and touches. …
translation_text.sn12.43:3.5: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn12.43:3.6: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn12.43:3.7: Feeling is a requirement for craving. …
translation_text.sn12.43:3.8: This is the origin of suffering.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.1: And what is the disappearance of suffering?
translation_text.sn12.43:4.2: Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.3: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.4: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.5: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.6: When grasping ceases, continued existence ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.7: When continued existence ceases, rebirth ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.8: When rebirth ceases, old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress cease.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.9: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:4.10: This is the disappearance of suffering.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.1: Ear consciousness arises dependent on the ear and sounds. …
translation_text.sn12.43:5.2: Nose consciousness arises dependent on the nose and smells. …
translation_text.sn12.43:5.3: Tongue consciousness arises dependent on the tongue and tastes. …
translation_text.sn12.43:5.4: Body consciousness arises dependent on the body and touches. …
translation_text.sn12.43:5.5: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.6: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.7: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.8: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.9: When grasping ceases, continued existence ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.10: When continued existence ceases, rebirth ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.11: When rebirth ceases, old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress cease.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.12: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn12.43:5.13: This is the disappearance of suffering.”
